description: Member enrichment: enclosing_type (qualified-name resolution), member_kind (field/method), visibility (public/private/protected). Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen — Rust impl methods via enclosing_type, C/C++ fixtures for member_kind/visibility.

cases.name: enclosing_type_methods
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE enclosing_type='SegmentReader' LIMIT 100

cases.name: member_kind_method
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='field' WHERE member_kind='method' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: struct_public_fields
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/result.rs' WHERE fql_kind='field' WHERE name MATCHES '^mem_' WHERE visibility='public' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 20

cases.name: visibility_protected
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='field' WHERE visibility='protected' LIMIT 10

cases.name: negative_no_method_field_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/result.rs' WHERE fql_kind='field' WHERE member_kind='method' LIMIT 5
